string 2:
You hear voices coming from downstairs. Time to go see what all the 
fuss is about.

It'll be fiiine this time, I swear! No one's even been to 
this spot before!
Y-You said the same thing last time, and look what happened!
...Oh, hey! I remember you! Heard you're crashing at Inori's place now.

Say, I've got an idea, Inori. Why not bring your buddy in the weird—
sorry, interesting—outfit along for the ride?

With one more subject to film, I bet we'll get a ton of great 
clippable moments!
What are you talking about?{next}
I remember you too...{next}
You'll have to talk to my boss for my hourly rate.{next}
Caught your interest, have I? Oh—I'm getting ahead of myself.

Thanks for all your help back there! Allow me to introduce 
myself.
Oooh, that's the spirit! Let's cut to the chase, then.

In case you forgot, the name's Hiroko Sagisaka. I go to
school with Inori. Same class, even!

And like I might have mentioned, I've got my own occult streaming channel.
It's called "OcculTokyo TV"!

I caught wind of a new paranormal phenomenon and went to 
all the trouble of putting together an entire shoot schedule.

...But, my girl here doesn't seem very sold on the idea. Could you maybe
hype it up for me?
I can't afford to ignore any paranormal phenomenon.{next}
Diving right back into danger, huh?{next}
Haven't learned a thing, have you?{next}
I know, right?! I knew you'd think so, too!

Hey! Things all kinda worked out in the end last time, right?
No reason to expect anything different this time!

What?! Of course I did! I got yelled at for HOURS after that whole mess
last time!

But I'll never get those sub numbers up if I let myself get 
discouraged now!

I say we head on back. C'mon! The world of the underground 
is calling our names!
Knock it off, Hiroko! You're being a giant pain!

I'm not giving up! I'll be passing ten thousand subscribers
any day now!
I'll see you guys later, then. I know you won't leave me hanging!
A streaming channel that deals in paranormal phenomena...
Do you remember what I said to you, Agent {player}?

That time I narrowed down the target coordinates for you, 
right before the Shinjuku Inferno happened?

The reason I was able to do that was thanks to some videos that 
were uploaded by members of the public eight years ago.
Now I'm wondering... Could those two girls have uploaded that video?

We need every bit of information we can get. I say going with
them would hardly be the worst idea in the world...

There's no stopping Hiroko when she gets like this. Sorry
about that...
..."Agent."
"Agent"? Who, me...?{next}
...Hee hee.

Yeah, you. I heard from my dad that you're in the same line 
of work he used to be in.

That's so cool... You're, like, out there, in the real
world...

One more thing... Your outfit looks like something from this anime
I used to watch called "Agent Alpha." Do you know it?

It's about a hero who would solve mysterious cases in secret, 
working together with the members of his secret organization.

It's an old show, but it fits you to a "T"! I'm a huge fan, so I
pretty much have to call you "Agent," don't you think?

I apologize for Hiroko being so pushy... but I hate to leave her
on her own. Would you be willing to tag along, Agent?
If there's an anomaly out there, it's my job to handle it.{next}
We could learn something that'd help us change the future.{next}
Hopefully it's a small step toward stopping global collapse.{next}
Really? You mean it? I thought for sure you'd say no...
You know... despite your outfit...
...you're actually really nice, aren't you?

...Well, I guess I could've skipped the part about your
outfit. Hee hee! It's got to be a uniform, right? I like it!

Anyway, let's go. Hiroko told me the place was a "back alley 
of Shinjuku."

About time! Consistency is the difference between a successful
creator and a ten-viewer Andy, so get moving!

Our objectives are the mysterious creatures skulking around 
the underground! Let's head on down!
Okay, we're rolling here, people.
"What's up everyone, this is OcculTokyo TV here with another video!"

"Today, we'll be acting on a tip from a viewer! It's time to uncover the truth
behind the Shinjuku Underground Cavern!"

We're starting this investigation off with a bang! 
Here! We! Goooooo!
Sorry about this {player}...
...All part of the job.{next}
I can't let an anomaly go un-investigated.{next}
Let's go for a million views!{next}
...Really? Good, then.

So it's true, huh? You really are doing the same kind of
work my dad used to do.
And... Yup, definitely a good person. Hehe.

I can feel it... the paranormal is calling our names!
And I'm gonna farm them for views!
Let's stay on our toes, people!
Huh? Look! Over there...
Wait. Could that be...?{next}
The one from before...{next}
That Digimon...?{next}
What's up? You spot something?
I think that was Coo.
Hey, is that... that monster from before?
Coo isn't a monster.

The way those others were bullying the poor thing... He was
hurt, too, so I'm worried...
Ho, boy. Here we go again.
You're almost, like, pathologically maternal.

Always bringing home any little injured kitty or birdie you 
come across...

And then, because of your pop's allergies, you always end up 
having to find somebody else to foster them.
Nobody is gonna want to take in a monster as a pet.

Sorry. It's just that... I want to at least treat his
injuries...
Hehe. Yeah, yeah. I get it. I'm just giving you a hard time.
I get why you're like this, Inori.

I'm happy to indulge you this time, too. As long as I get 
some good content.

All right, then. Let's go track down that little critter!
Time to search this place from end to end!
Who would've thought there'd be a place like this underground?
"Just what awaits us up ahead?

"If you wanna see what happens, you'd better like this video,
smash that subscribe button, and turn on notifications!"
I knew it! Is that you, Coo?
I-Is it really safe to get so close to that thing?
Oh, hey! Wait up, Coo!
Jeez, Hiroko! You're so nervous that you got Coo all spooked too.

H-How can you be so calm around that thing?! No telling what kind
of monster it is!
I told you, Coo's not a monster! The poor little thing is probably...
It's probably... a "phase electron lifeform"...
Uh, come again?
I saw it in my dad's notes... The term came up over and over again.

He even quit his old job so he could spend all his time 
trying to find them...

Whoa! In that case, we've definitely gotta go grab that 
little sucker! After it! Chop, chop!
Wait, don't go!

Inori, I know I say this every time you help out one of your
beloved little critters, but...

...rescuing random animals isn't ever gonna bring what
you lost ba—
Yeah, I know. Really, I do! ...I'm sorry.

...I'll sneak up from this side. A-and you guys circle around
from the other side, okay?
It's okay, Coo!

Hey... Were you okay after we left? No one's trying to bully
you anymore, are they?
Ahhhh!
G-Get out of there, Inori!
...No way.
Just look at its eyes... It's obviously trying to bully Coo!
I knew it, Inori... You can't let go of the past, can you?!
Sorry to ask this of you, {player}, but please! I need your help!
I can't let this happen.
It's just that... Yuu used to get picked on a lot too...!
Wait, are you thinking of fighting that thing?
All right, then...! Just... Be careful!
Coo!
Coo-aaagh!
*panting*
Why can't I... do anything right...?
I can't... protect anyone...?
If only I was stronger...!
I could... I could have saved Mom, I could have saved Yuu!
GRAAAAARGH!
No!
GRAAAAAAARGH!
NO! I WON'T LET YOU!
Urgh!
Coo-ack!
I want to protect Coo...! I want the strength to protect him!
Ngah...?!
Huh...?
Whoa... What...?!
COOooooo!
Yaaaaaaah!
I'm... Aegiomon.
Thank you... for saving me.
This time... I'll protect you, with MY strength!
You said... your name is Aegiomon?
What's... your name?
I'm Inori. Inori Misono.
Thank you for saving me... Inori.
You're not hurt, are you...?
Oh... Thank good...ne...
A-Aegiomon...! A-Are you all right?
Agent {player}... I see the situation has changed once again.
...I just witnessed an anomalous phenomenon.{next}
We're all safe, for now.
Coo has evolved into the form of a young boy.

...Yes, we've ascertained as much. We're definitely dealing 
with an anomaly.

We'll proceed with our analysis, and I'll contact you again 
once we know more.

Which means we're good for the time being. I'll keep
monitoring the situation, too.
What? We've never seen anything like that before...

So much happened so quickly... My brain can hardly keep up 
with all of this.
Hey, kids. What's all the commotion about?
Uh—who is that child?
Dad... I'm sure this is going to be hard to believe, but he's—
No, it couldn't be... Is that...?
...I see.

Looks like letting you stay with us was the right decision 
after all...
I think you kids should call it quits for the day.
Huh?

You should go take a break. I mean... you've had quite the 
day, right?
Um, w-well, yeah, but... This kid... I think he's—
Yeah, I know. He's not human, right?
That hammock in the attic... He can sleep there.
Go on, then. Get some rest, you guys. You've earned it.
